fullArticle:
This lavish estate could make you the next prince—or princess—of Bel Air.

The sprawling abode sits on a prime 1.2 acres overlooking the tenth hole of the tony Bel-Air Country Club. Sporting a classic, Georgian-style exterior, the home has been revamped inside by the acclaimed designer Kelly Wearstler, who’s imbued the interiors with a sexy, high-gloss aesthetic. It’s certainly not for those afraid of color, pattern, or texture.

Entering into the 14,200-square-foot residence, the foyer sports a kaleidoscopic tiled floor. From here, there’s a plush formal living room, outfitted mostly in neutral tones, and a darker, moodier sitting room, where the black walls feature a studded pattern. Another lounge includes a bar you can sidle up to for cocktail hour, while the spacious formal dining roo...
